name: $EXTENSION_NAME
description: One fast, accessible, and secure platform for digital assets, DApps, NFTs, and DeFi.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self' $LOCALHOST_DEFAULT_SRC; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' $LOCALHOST_SCRIPT_SRC $REACT_DEVTOOLS_DEFAULT_SRC; object-src 'self'; connect-src $MIDNIGHT_SERVICES $CARDANO_SERVICES_URLS $BITCOIN_SERVICES_URLS $COINGECKO_API_URL $LOCALHOST_CONNECT_SRC $REDUX_DEVTOOLS_SERVER $REACT_DEVTOOLS_CONNECT_SRC $POSTHOG_API_URL $HANDLE_API_URL $SENTRY_CONNECT_SRC $SWAP_PROVIDER_URLS data:; style-src * 'unsafe-inline'; img-src * data:; font-src 'self' $FONT_TYPEKIT_URL; frame-src $FRAME_URL;
